titleStmt.title: SII 11.111: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 111. (B.K. No. 79 of 1926-27). SORAṬŪR. GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB LYING IN THE RUINED JAINA BASTI.

summary.p: The inscription belongs to the reign of Bhuvanaikamalladēva (Sōmēśvara II) and records a grant of land made by his feudatory Mahāpradhāna, Hēri-sandhivigrahi, Sēnādhipati, Kaḍitavergaḍe, Daṇḍanāyaka, Baladēvayya, to the temple of Baladēvajinālaya at the agrahāra Saraṭavura of his prabhu-sāmya. The chief is said to be the son of Aggaḷadēva of the Gaṅga family and Gojjikabbe and the younger brother of Beḷdēva. The gift was entrusted to Huḷiyabbājjike, a lady disciple of Siriṇandi-Paṇḍita who belonged to the Sūrastha-gaṇa and the Chitrakūṭ-ānvaya. The Two Hundred Mahājanas of Saraṭvūra also made grants of land, oil-mill and house-site to the same temple.

The inscription is dated Śaka 993, Virōdhakṛit, Māgha, śu. pāḍiva, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti, vyatīpāta. The month is clearly a wrong citation for Pushya. The other details being correct, the date corresponds to A.D. 1071, December 25, Sunday.

Of the Chitrakūṭ-ānvaya, the following teachers are mentioned:—Chandaṇandi Siddhānta-Munīśvara, Dāvaṇandi Siddhānta-Munīśvara, Sakaḷachandra-Munīndra, Kanakaṇandi-Saiddhāntika and Siriṇandi-Paṇḍitadēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
bhadramastu jinaśāsanasya . śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōghalāṁcchanaṁ . jīyāttraiḷōkyanāthasya śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ [. 1 .*]
© svasti samastasurāsuramastakamakuṭāṁśujāḷajaḷadhautapadaprastutajinēndraśāsana mastu ciraṁ bhadramamaḷabhavyajanānāṁ . [2 .*]
svasti . samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cā
ḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmadbhuvanaikamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ salu
ttamire . v® . Aṁgavarāḷasiṁgaḷikagūrjjaramāḷavacērapāṇḍyakāḷiṁgakhasāndhrayādavamahībhujamauḷimaṇibraja
prabhāliṁgitapādapīṭha namarēndraviḷāsa navāryyavīryya nuttuṁgayaśaṁ samastabhuvanāśraya nāhavamallanandana . [3 .*]
jananāthaṁ bhuvanaikamallamahipaṁ cāḷukyamārttaṇḍa nādinarēndrapratimaṁ svabāhubaḷadiṁ pūrvvāparādrīndrahirmya
nagādhīśvara sētusīme yenisirddīdhātriyaṁ kūḍe vairinṛpāḷarkkaḷanikki sauryyadhananēkacchatramaṁ māḍidaṁ . [4 .*] tatpādapadmō
pajīvi . samadhigatapañcamahāśabdamahāsāmaṁtādhipatimahāpracaṇḍadaṇḍanāyakaṁ . samastasāmaṁtapari
vṛtāsthānavastumaṇināyakaṁ . bhuvanaikamallavallabhatējōvirājitaprārabdhapravīṇaṁ . samyaktvaśīḷa pramāṇanirvvā
ṇa . viśamādēśa kauśaḷavyāpārayōgandharaṁ . kuṁtaḷādhīśahitōpadēśadhurandhara . candanabahaḷaparimaḷāmōdaṁ . jinēnḍra
caraṇārccanavinōdaṁ . dīnahīnanānāmanujaparipōṣaṇaṁ . vijayakaṭakavibhūṣaṇa . naṇnanavajjraṁ . svāmidrōhaśi
racchēdakaṁ . śrīmadbhuvanaikamalladēvapādārādhakaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ . hērisandhivigrahi . sēnādhipati . kaḍitaverggaḍe .
daṇḍanāyaka baladēvayya . v® . poredāḷdaṁ bhuvanaikamallamahipaṁ tanniṣṭadaivaṁ jinēśvaranātmāṁbike gojjikabbhe janakaṁ gaṁ
gānvayaśrīvadhūvara nappaggaḷadēva naṇnananaghaṁ beḷdēvanendaṁde bhāsuratējaṁ baladēvaneyde kṛtakṛtya cakradoThe letter va is engraved below the line.
ḷ . [*.] kaṁ . paramajinaṁ tanagāptaṁ . guruga ḷnayasēnadēva rūrjjitadharmmaṁ piridappa basanameṁdoḍe dhareyoḷ baladēvanantu nō
ntarumoḷarē . [6 .*] vaca . Intenisi negaḻda śrīmaddaṇḍanāyaka baladēvayyaṁgaḷ . vṛttaṁ . Idu dharmmāmṛtasindhu suśrutalatā
sandōhakandaṁ dayānadigutpattiya beṭṭu tatvada tavarssaṁsāravārāsigikkida caitraṁ toḍavārhatakkene janaṁ bhū
bhāgadoḷpeṁpuvettudu sūrasthagaṇaṁ prasiddha madaṟoḷśrī citrakūṭānvayaṁ . [7 .*] vaca . Ā citrakū
ṭānvayadoḷ . v® . kantumadēbhasiṁharene sanda pogartteya candaṇandisiddhāntamunīśvarargurugaḷeṁba negartteya
dāvaṇandi siddhāntamunīśvara rttamage śiṣyagaṇādhipareṁba peṁpu lōkāntamaneyditēṁ sakaḷacandramu
nīndra ragaṇyapuṇyarō . [8 .*] Avara sahadharmmigaḷ . yaśaṟprasaranirmmaḷadyutiraḷaṁkṛtāśāṁbarō budha
pramadakṛdguṇaḥ kuvaḷayapramōdapradaḥ jayatyadhikajainaśāsanapayōdhisaṁvarddhanaḥ prabhūtagu
ṇadīdhitiḥ kanakaṇandisaiddhāntikaḥ . [9 .*] Avara siṣya rpparavādisarabhabhēruṇḍāparanāmadhēyarenisi negaḻda si
riṇaṁdi paṇḍitadēvara śiṣyiṁtiyarappa kuḷiyabbājjikeyargge . saka varṣa 993 neya virōdhakṛtsaṁvatsa
rada māgha suddha pāḍiva mādityavāra muttarāyaṇasaṁkrāṁti vyatīpātadaṁdu pādaprakṣāḷana
tanna prabhusāmyada Agrahāraṁ saraṭavurada baladēvajinālayakke tamma mānyadoḷage Iṁ ba
diṁ paḍuva mūvattāṟu mattarkkeyyumaṁ . hadiyaṟa dōṁṭadiṁ teṁkamūḍadesayalaynūṟu
ṭamumaṁ taḷabhōgamumaṁ sarbbabādhāparihāramāge biṭṭu koṭṭar . matta mā baladēvayya
kke . svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamaunānuṣṭhānaparāyaṇajapasamādhiśīḷa saṁppa
nnarappa śrīmatsaraṭavurada mahājanavinnūrvvaru miḻdru Elevaḷḷadiṁ mūḍalu pannirmmattarkkeyyu
ynūrubaḷḷiya tōṁṭamumaṁ . Ondu ghāṇamumaṁ . Eraḍu maneya nivēśaṇamumaṁ . sarvva
hāramāge biṭṭu koṭṭar . bahubhirvvasudhā bhuktvā rājabhissagarādibhiḥ yasya yasya ye
stasya tasya tadā phaḷaṁ . [10 .*] svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣasa
yāṁ jāyatē krimi . [11 .*] sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētuṁ nṛpāṇāṁ kāḷē kāḷē pāḷanīyō
nētā nrāginaṟpārtthivēndrā nbhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ . [12 .*] Ī dharmma
ṁ pratipāḷisidanātaṁge sāsirakavileya kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ ponnoḷ kaṭṭisi vāra
kṣētradoḷ sabrāhmaṇa rggubhayamukhigoṭṭa phaḷamakku midanaḷida ninitumana
hāpātakanaku . sarasataramāduvendakkarigarbbaṇnipinami śiḷāśāsanamaṁ sa
muttina sarigeyananukarise kannapayyaṁ baredaṁ . [13 .*] © ©
Digital edition of SII 11.111 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
